completed_tasks.title: Review Strike 2: Verify no lint errors exist in the codebase with enterprise-grade standards
completed_tasks.description:
Perform a comprehensive code review with focus on: Verify no lint errors exist in the codebase with enterprise-grade standards

Check the entire codebase and ensure this criterion is met.

## CRITICAL FAILURE RESPONSE PROTOCOL

IF LINT ERRORS FOUND: Create specific tasks with appropriate categories to achieve zero lint errors:
- Linting tool setup and configuration tasks (category: 'linter-error')
- Code style correction tasks (category: 'linter-error')
- Import organization tasks (category: 'linter-error')
- Naming convention fixes tasks (category: 'linter-error')
- Dead code removal tasks (category: 'refactor')

CRITICAL: Use TaskManager API to add these tasks immediately when lint errors are detected. Follow production-ready standards, not quick fixes.

## SUCCESS CRITERIA
- Mark this review task as completed ONLY if the criterion is fully met
- If criterion fails, you MUST create remediation tasks using TaskManager API before marking review as completed
- All new tasks should be actionable, specific, and include proper dependencies/important_files parameters

## TASK CREATION REQUIREMENT
When creating remediation tasks, ensure each task includes:
- Clear success criteria
- Appropriate category (linter-error, build-error, missing-feature, bug, enhancement, etc.)
- Specific file dependencies
- Realistic time estimates
- High priority for critical issues
- Production-ready implementation requirements

Use the task-creation.md guidelines for optimal task structure.

completed_tasks.title: Implement comprehensive unit tests for core business logic modules
completed_tasks.description:
Create comprehensive unit test coverage for critical business logic modules that require 100% test coverage. Current analysis shows significant gaps in core module testing.

CRITICAL MODULES REQUIRING 100% COVERAGE:
- apps/sim/lib/workflows/ (versioning, collaboration, validation)
- apps/sim/lib/auth/ (authentication, permissions, session management)
- apps/sim/lib/permissions/ (authorization, access control)
- apps/sim/serializer/ (workflow serialization, YAML conversion)
- apps/sim/tools/ (tool execution, parameter validation)
- apps/sim/blocks/ (block validation, execution logic)

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit tests for all public functions and methods
- Edge case testing for error conditions
- Input validation and sanitization testing
- Performance testing for critical paths
- Mock external dependencies properly
- Production-ready test scenarios

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- 100% line coverage for all critical modules
- All business logic edge cases tested
- Comprehensive error handling validation
- Integration with existing test infrastructure

completed_tasks.title: Create comprehensive unit tests for serializer and tools modules to achieve 100% code coverage
completed_tasks.description:
TARGET MODULES:
- apps/sim/serializer/ (workflow serialization, YAML conversion, state management)
- apps/sim/tools/ (tool execution, parameter validation, function registry)

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
1. Serializer Module: Workflow serialization, data validation, error handling, performance testing, edge cases
2. Tools Module: Tool execution, parameter validation, registry, error handling, security testing
3. Production-ready test patterns with mocking and isolation
4. Performance benchmarks and security testing
5. 100% line coverage for critical workflow execution components

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- 100% line coverage for both modules
- All edge cases and error scenarios tested
- Performance benchmarks implemented
- Security validation included
- Integration with existing test infrastructure

completed_tasks.title: Develop comprehensive React component test coverage
completed_tasks.description:
Create comprehensive test coverage for React components throughout the application. Current analysis shows severe lacking in component testing with only ~30% coverage vs 80% target.

COMPONENT AREAS REQUIRING TESTING:
- Workflow editor components (canvas, blocks, connections)
- UI components in apps/sim/components/
- Workspace and folder management components
- Authentication and user management components
- Dashboard and analytics components
- Form components and validation
- Modal and dialog components

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- React Testing Library integration
- Component rendering and interaction tests
- Props validation and edge case testing
- User interaction simulation (clicks, forms, navigation)
- Accessibility testing integration
- State management testing (hooks, context)
- Error boundary and loading state testing

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- 90%+ component test coverage
- All critical user interactions tested
- Comprehensive accessibility validation
- Integration with existing test infrastructure
- Production-ready component testing patterns

completed_tasks.title: Setup comprehensive test coverage reporting and CI/CD integration
completed_tasks.description:
Implement comprehensive test coverage reporting system and integrate with CI/CD pipeline to enforce coverage requirements and ensure production-ready quality.

COVERAGE REPORTING REQUIREMENTS:
- Configure vitest coverage reporting with detailed metrics
- Set up coverage thresholds (100% for critical modules, 90% for others)
- Generate HTML coverage reports for detailed analysis
- Implement coverage badges and metrics dashboard
- Create automated coverage trend tracking

CI/CD INTEGRATION:
- Enforce coverage requirements in CI pipeline
- Block deployment if coverage falls below thresholds
- Automated test execution on all PRs
- Coverage diff reporting for code changes
- Integration with GitHub Actions or similar CI/CD

MONITORING AND ALERTS:
- Coverage regression detection
- Automated alerts for coverage drops
- Performance monitoring for test execution
- Test failure notifications and reporting
- Quality gate enforcement

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- Automated coverage reporting working
- CI/CD pipeline enforcing coverage requirements
- Clear visibility into coverage metrics
- Quality gates preventing regression
- Production-ready monitoring and alerting

completed_tasks.title: Research: Implement Nexus Copilot - Comprehensive API Integration
completed_tasks.description:
Research and analysis required for implementing: "Implement Nexus Copilot - Comprehensive API Integration"

**Implementation Task Details:**
Build a powerful Nexus copilot system that integrates with ALL API features in the Sim codebase. This will create a self-powered AI assistant using Claude API that can interact with workflows, users, billing, knowledge bases, templates, and all other system components.

COMPREHENSIVE INTEGRATION SCOPE:

1. NEXUS TOOLSET CREATION:
- Create apps/sim/lib/nexus/tools/ directory
- Implement comprehensive tools for ALL major API endpoints:
  * Workflow management (create, read, update, delete, execute)
  * User management and authentication
  * Billing and subscription management
  * Knowledge base operations
  * Template management and deployment
  * File operations (upload, download, organize)
  * OAuth credential management
  * Organization and team management
  * Environment variable management
  * Usage tracking and analytics
  * Webhook management
  * Custom tool integration

2. NEXUS BACKEND API:
- Create apps/sim/app/api/nexus/chat/route.ts
- Implement streaming Claude 3.5 Sonnet integration
- Connect all Nexus tools with proper error handling
- Add comprehensive logging and monitoring

3. NEXUS FRONTEND INTEGRATION:
- Duplicate and enhance copilot UI components
- Create dedicated Nexus panel in workflow editor
- Implement rich UI for tool responses
- Add visual feedback for complex operations

4. TOOL IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENTS:
- Each tool must have comprehensive error handling
- All tools should include detailed logging
- Implement proper authentication and authorization
- Add input validation and sanitization
- Include comprehensive JSDoc documentation

5. ADVANCED FEATURES:
- Multi-step workflow automation
- Contextual awareness of current workspace/workflow
- Intelligent suggestions based on user activity
- Integration with existing Sim copilot for coordination

SUCCESS CRITERIA:
- Nexus can perform ALL major operations available via Sim APIs
- Complete integration with authentication and authorization
- Comprehensive error handling and user feedback
- Production-ready code with full logging and monitoring
- Seamless UI integration with existing workflow editor

**Research Objectives:**
1. Investigate best practices and methodologies for this implementation
2. Identify potential challenges, risks, and mitigation strategies  
3. Research relevant technologies, frameworks, and tools
4. Define implementation approach and architecture decisions
5. Provide actionable recommendations and guidance

**Research Priority:** This research task must be completed before implementation begins
